_phase: PHASE 2 INVERSE BATCH 1 (fit real beat with fibre_wl40 pattern family). Previous batch 14 (Phase 1 forward atlas) identified fibre_wl40 as the morphology leader (open 0.262, aspect 0.35, angle 3.06 rad). Now inverse-train this pattern family on the REAL cardiomyocyte beat, learning the per-particle gain + direction fields via UNet. Parent=fibre_wl40 (batch 14 s0, the Phase-1 atlas winner). Sweep amplitude [10,15,7] (size lever, bounded by phase-1 findings) and drag [30,60,15] to find which point in the fibre_wl40 family best fits real per-node morphology (R² + loop-morphology loss: openness, axis-angle, size, chirality). Ablation amp0. Report: interior R² · loop metrics (openness/angle/size/chirality) · learned gain/direction coherence.
